name: azaharizaman/nexus-assets
description: Framework-agnostic fixed asset management with progressive delivery (SB→MB→LE)

suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-accounting: Optional integration dependency; currently not referenced by package src.
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-audit: Optional integration dependency; currently not referenced by package src.
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-audit-logger: Comprehensive audit trail for asset changes and transfers
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-document: Attach purchase orders, invoices, photos, and maintenance records to assets
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-event-stream: Event sourcing for asset lifecycle replay (recommended for audited environments)
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-product: For barcode/QR code asset tag generation (Tier 3)
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-sequencing: Optional integration dependency; currently not referenced by package src.
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-uom: Optional integration dependency; currently not referenced by package src.
suggest.azaharizaman/nexus-workflow: Multi-level approval workflows for asset disposal and revaluation
